question.ask: 10. Where did she give a lesson to students on June 20th, 2013?

info.value: Wang Yaping is the first woman taikonaut (太空人) to work in China's Tiangong space station and the first Chinese woman to walk in space. Wang Yaping was born in a small village in Yantai, Shandong Province in 1980. She was a good runner and competed in local sports meetings. She was strong, healthy and calm, as a result, she passed some tests and became a pilot in 1997. Her dream was to visit space. It began in 2003, when China sent its first taikonaut, Yang Liwei, into space. On June 11th, 2013, Wang Yaping entered space. Her dream came true. She even gave a lesson to students in the spaceship from space on June 20th, 2013.
